calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-09-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Catherine K. Fong of the law offices of Hunt & Henriques (408-362-2295) appears by telephone as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The matter is passed and recalled to allow time for moving party appearance. There being no appearance by moving party, the Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT ROSEMARY MCCOY'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT is OFF CALENDAR. The only competent evidence before the court is the declaration of Catherine Fong and she indicates that the motion was never served on plaintiff.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR No. 5220, e-mail: robertbalian.csr@gmail.com (L&M302)

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Notice Of Opposition To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Rosemary McCoy, Judgment Debtor appearing in Propria Persona
No other appearances.

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED: Hearing On Claim Of Exemption.
Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $50 per pay period. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
